parameters: # Would you like to check the tutorial?
(You can always do so from the bookshelf at home.)
From here on out, you will control the protagonist
for a period of 10 days from 07/15, with 5 turns (Morning, Noon, Afternoon, Night, Midnight)
in each day, for 50 turns total.
Your goal will be to collect flags for each route during those 50 turns.
If you do not manage to raise any flags, it will result in a BAD END.
Aside from just events, you can also spend turns by skipping
time using your phone in any place aside from the world map.
The same can also be done by clicking the time slot icon on
the top left. Please use whicever.
It's possible to jump to the world map at any time with
just a single button press from any and every map as well.
There is a toggleable NTR Flag Guide option in the configuration
menu. Please turn it on (default) if you wish to know the locations of the other men,
or turn it off if you wish to clear the game without those hints.
1) RIME -> Chat with a character (with unread functionality)
4) Photo gallery (view the photos collected so far, etc)
the smartphone can also be used for these features.
The above features are not essential to progress the game, so
please enjoy them as a sort of bonus elements.
This information can be accessed again at any time using the bookshelf in your room.

Would you like to view the user guide? (Can be viewed at any time from your room's 
bookshelf)
That marks the end of the tutorial.

name: ルート分岐プレイヤー座標取得

parameters: As I was walking aimlessly around town, with the thought
that walks are nice every so often too... I met someone unexpected.
I returned that same question to her.
\SE[10]Me? I'm actually going to be working as a part time tutor from today~
That was the first I was hearing of it.
\se[30-nb]\SA[130]It was a pretty sudden arrangement so I might've forgotten to tell you, sorry.
\se[32-nb]This is Keiichi-kun. He's... the son of a very~
important national diet member, you see.
I did hear rumours before about this being the house of some big shot.
Just when did Shino get herself connections like this?
Erhm, uhm... yes but no, it's hard to explain...
is what I answered with, while ending up a bit flustered.
...It's not like it's wrong, so there's no reason for me to panic.
She hung her head with a similarly red face.
\SE[1]I see~, I can understand. Shino-sensei's just so cute.
\se[2]Sorry, \n[1] onii-san, I'll be borrowing her for a bit.
I just have to have her tutor me, so that I can become a man
\se[30]\SA[130]I just happened to meet him in town one day, you know?
That's when he asked me to be his tutor. It caught me so off-guard.
\se[32-nb]It's not like I have insanely good grades either but,
I ended up giving in to Keiichi-kun's enthusiasm.
...I'll try to do what I can, so be patient with me.
\SE[2]At first I only shot my shot since it couldn't hurt but,
listening to how she just wanted to be more helpful to her
family really made me fall for her...
\sa[124]\SM[pop]\SE[19]I'll do my best so, please take care of me!
\SE[21]Well then, it's about time we started, see you later, \n[1].
スライドスピード = def
I saw off Shino and the politely bowing Keiichi-kun.
...He's got a good head on his shoulders.
Let's see, I guess I should do something too. Seeing those
two hardworkers made me feel a bit impatient myself, and so I left.
\se[22]\SA[124]Okay--, I think we can call it there? Good work today, Keiichi-kun.
\se[31-nb]How was it? Did I... teach well? It wasn't awkward, was it?
\se[2]\SA[124]No way, it was very easy to understand, Shino-sensei.
Do you have experience with tutoring others?
Well, a particularly dense student does live next door to me... so I guess?
\se[19-nb]You're talking about \n[1] onii-san, aren't you? Have you been dating long?
\SE[3]Well, you looked really close to me, and I think he
really does love you a lot, Shino-sensei.
\se[28]\SM[rock]N-N-N-N-N-N-No way~! He's super dense and inconsiderate,
and he can't even get up by himself... I really don't know what to do with him.
\se[19-nb]Hahahah, I hope you two can keep getting along like that.
\se[31-nb]Jeez--... sometimes, you really do seem a whole lot
You're such a good boy... Don't suppose you'll help me
\sa[125]\SE[18]Hahahah--, please don't say that, I've still...
スライドスピード = def
アニメーションタイプ = def
I found Shino poring over a notebook. Is she getting ready for her tutoring work?
\se[14-nb]It's almost time for me to go over and tutor Keiichi-kun~.
Seeing her enjoying it so much got me curious too,
so I asked her about the work.
\se[2]\SA[124]Yep, it's difficult to teach others but it's also pretty fun,
and Keiichi-kun's a really good boy so I can just about manage.
\SE[8]I'm being paid pretty handsomely, as like a bonus?
Since he asked me to be his tutor out of nowhere.
I'm not sure whether I'm providing all that much value for how much I'm getting...
\se[13-nb]But I want to help onee-chan with the finances as much as I can,
so I'm just going to give it my best shot.
\SE[0]Ah, it's about time~. I'm off then~.
スライドスピード = def
I waved at her, and saw her off towards the path to Keiichi-kun's home.
Maybe I'll do my best too.
...Though I'll have to find something to do my best on first.
\SE[21]Wah, I'm surprised you figured that out. Yep, it is.
Even if it's breaktime, I shouldn't be staring into my phone, should I... I'm sorry.
\se[18-nb]I don't mind. You're working so hard for my sake, Shino-sensei.
Please do whatever you like during breaktime.
\se[40-nb]You really are just such a good boy, Keiichi-kun...
What's a good boy like you looking at on your phone?
\SE[22]Working hard even during breaktime... I should learn from you--!
\SE[1]Hahahah, it's just some stuff related to my own hobbies,
so it's nothing for you to praise me over.
\se[25]\SM[jump]Well then, let's get back to studying, okay?
Let's get it done lickety-split, Keiichi-kun.
...Damn, I didn't think she'd be this exploitable.)
...But my father always taught me to take what I want, even if by force.)
\SE[11-nb](....I guess it's about time for me to make my move.)
Shino and Keiichi-kun were chatting in front of his main gate.
I feel like she's not her usual self today.
When I asked her if she was alright...
\se[31-nb]\SA[130]Yeah, it's nothing that big a deal, I'm fine.
\se[4]Onii-san, hello there. Shino-sensei seems to be
At those words, I turned to look at Shino again...
and saw that her cheeks were a bit flushed. Does she have a fever?
\SE[3]I'll make sure to get someone to take her home so
\SE[2]Sensei... are you alright? I realize that I sprung the whole tutoring
business on you out of nowhere, but you're not straining yourself, are you?
You don't need to bother, I can get home by myself...
\SE[2]That's no good, if something happens to you then I won't know
I'll have someone drop her off at home.
Please get some rest, Shino-sensei... I'm looking forward to the next 'lesson'.
スライドスピード = def
Seems like he got someone to drop her off by car after that.
Seems like she's valued more as a tutor than she herself thought.
I bet she's making for a great teacher.
I sent her a message just to confirm, and got back an "I'm alright"
from her, so that's a relief.
Now then, what should I do...
\SE[10]So, with this part... you do it like this...
\SE[10]How about it? It's a bit difficult, but I'm sure you can...
My body stiffened against the sensation I suddenly felt on my butt...
I slowly and fearfully turned my head to the side.
His hand, it was on my butt.
Though confused and frozen stiff, I still understood and tried to warn Keiichi-kun, when--
Kurumizawa Shino's family is made up of just 3 women, settled in XX flat of
Her older sister, Rino, works at Engawa Corp and her mother
Ayano is a self employed business owner.
Basically... in other words... Both of them live within my father's sphere of influence,
blown away with a single breath of his.
\SE[19]Keiichi-kun...? What do you, mean by that...
\n[1], her boyfriend that lives next door to her lives alone with his father.
Said father works for the same company mentioned earlier.
Did you know? The chair of the board there is nothing but my father's puppet.
The hand that was only lightly touching my butt at first... slowly
started snaking its way into my underwear.
Even though I hate it, even though I want to shake him off... I understood
the meaning of the words he spat out, and couldn't move my body.
\SE[12-nb]Just why do you think I went out of my way, to call out to you and
to ask you to be my tutor?
There's no shortage of students out there with grades like yours, you know.
\SE[12-nb]You're a smart girl, sensei... you should know what I picked you, right?
[演出]opacity/キャラの不透明度変更
相対値指定フラグ = def
[演出]opacity/キャラの不透明度変更
相対値指定フラグ = def
I completely understood what he was saying, and felt awash with regret.
...There were so many chances already, for me to realize it.
But instead I started thinking that maybe I was just that special.
The only parts of me that are more special than other girls are...
[演出]opacity/キャラの不透明度変更
相対値指定フラグ = def
[演出]opacity/キャラの不透明度変更
相対値指定フラグ = def
-- It's those tits, and that face.
I couldn't help but want to turn you into my own personal
toy from the moment I first saw you.
Such a pretty face, and such big tits. I wanted to make both of them... mine.
The Keiichi-kun that I'd known for this brief period was nowhere to be seen.
The only one in front of me... was a man with the eyes of a ravenous wolf
Keiichi-kun... it's still not too late, let's stop this, okay?
You're a good boy, so you shouldn't do stuff like this...
Hahah--, please stop with the jokes, sensei. There's still lots left that
I want you to teach me.
You're not saying that you want to quit now... are you?
If I do that... you'll lay your hands on the people I treasure, no?
I'm not stupid either, I can understand what you're saying.

parameters: Just as I was looking for an empty seat in the cafe...
A man with really flashy blonde hair called out to me suddenly.
Man, a shakedown already?... I have no confidence in my own strength.
If a week's worth of coffee money will keep him happy then so be it.
And so, I turned to look at his face, more clearly this time.
...and I realized that I actually knew the guy.
スライドスピード = def
\sa[124]\SE[0]So harsh~. I could tell you were ready to run, you know?
I'm your soul classmate, Charlie, you know?
...Charlie Ousuke. Just as his name suggests, he's a good-time Charlie (his own words)
whose appearance perfectly fits his style. He's also a classmate of mine.
His looks make people always give him a real wide berth at first glance but...
\se[21-nb]\SM[jump]I heard you finally got with Shino-chan? Grats~!
\se[16-nb]\SA[124]And it happened right on the day I skipped class too~, so I didn't know at all~

This good time Charlie's surprisingly a decent guy, huh?
He's a real sociable guy, and knows how to read the mood, so he's got a lot of friends.
\se[18-nb]Let me hop and grab something from the counter, save my seat~
I thanked him, and then sat down on the seat opposite to his.
Holding the latte he brought in one hand, I expressed my thanks to him again.

I'm joking, you don't gotta take it seriously.

my relationship with Shino, as if it was his own, made me realize
that you really shouldn't judge a book by its cover.

\SE[23-nb]Nah, not like I'm tryna diss you or anythin'.
Everyone's got their own pace, after all.

ask me anything you need help with. ...I'll cheer you on from behind.
\SE[11-nb]\SA[130]Ah, damn--. I forgot that I made a promise with this one girl.
